heading: Summer Work
text:
You will receive more info on recommended LinkedIn Learning courses to prepare for fall.
Strongly recommended unless you're confident you have mastery.
Covers:
Basic statistics
Descriptive statistics
Basic Excel
Excel Data Analysis ToolPak
Introduction to generative AI
Summer Work

heading: Laptop Recommendations
text:
Laptop Recommendations
Operating system: Windows 11 or macOS 26
Processor:
Windows: Intel i7 or AMD Ryzen 7, released in the past 3 years
Apple: Apple M3
Memory: 16 GB RAM
Storage: 1TB SSD
Display: HD (1920x1080)
Support for virtualization (Mac users): Some applications used in coursework are Windows only.

heading: Enrollment Info
text:
Fall Enrollment: 
You will be enrolled by me on or around July 9th 
I will block enroll you as we only have a few sections of your core courses. 

Spring Enrollment 
You will be enrolled in your core classes, you will enroll in your electives
This takes place mid-fall, October usually.
Enrollment Info

heading: ORIENTATION
text:
MSAIB required new student orientation: 

Monday and Tuesday August 17th and 18th 
Program orientation
Monday and Tuesday will be full, 8:30-5pm days.
Headshots, faculty presentations, workshops, program info, CMC presentation
Wednesday and Thursday the 19th and 20th for international students 
Through the International Office
Required, you will receive info directly from them
ORIENTATION

Cox Academic Schedule
Term Structure
Each GCOX Term (Spring, Summer or Fall) is divided into two seven-week modules (mod A and mod B)
There is a 1-week break between modules
Schedules:
You will have a regular class schedule, plus:
Holiday Make-Up Schedule (if you have a course that falls on a national holiday, there will be a make-up session communicated
Final Exam Schedule – there is a separate week 7 schedule for each mod; final exams may meet at a different day and time then the regular class
First day of fall module A is August 24; first day of fall module B is October 19!

2026-2027 Cox Academic Calendar
https://smu.box.com/s/uxioa74y72ltx8dbwlmyadwpk4is6yrl

heading: Did you activate?
text:
Did you activate?
Step 1: My.smu activation (need your ID #)
Activates my.smu, SMU email, Box, Microsoft 365
https://www.smu.edu/OIT/Services/Accounts 

Step 2: Review the main IT page, which links to resources and other activations. Make sure to click on CANVAS and activate:
https://www.smu.edu/OIT

my.SMU | SMU Email | Zoom | Canvas | SMU360 | Microsoft 365 | Other...
Schedule of Classes 
Course Catalog
Course Registration - You must clear all holds in my.smu.edu before you can register for any term
Request Transcript
SMU Pay | SMU email will be your primary email during the program
Professors will only send emails to your SMU email | Each student has an account
Make sure to update your profile, headshot, name | SMU's Learning Management System
Access to courses syllabi, assignments, chats, grades
Faculty must Publish it | GCOX Student Organizations (Clubs)
Events
Emails | Download includes the Microsoft Office products (Excel, Powerpoint, Outlook, etc.) | Slack 
Microsoft Teams

heading: Cox Policies
text:
Cox Policies
Other polices can be found in our Cox Catalog
Must maintain full-time status (over 9 hours) | Must maintain cumulative GPA 3.0 or higher
Must have cumulative GPA of 3.5 or higher to overload registration (over 16 hours) | Grade Forgiveness (Core or elective, maximum of 1)
Must be in good academic standing to run for leadership (clubs, SLG,...) | Professional Conduct/Honor Code

Cox Honor Code

All incoming Graduate Cox students must read and acknowledge the Honor Code: Read Here

Then please E-Sign the GCOX Honor Code, link coming via email
*This must be complete before you can start classes

YOUR NAME 
MSAIB Candidate, Class of (2026 or 2027)
Any designations, i.e. SLG President 
Cox School of Business | Southern Methodist University
email@smu.edu |Cell (if desired) | Link to LinkedIn
